activities.name: Truncate Sales Exp Invite Staging table

scripts.text: IF OBJECT_ID('OUT.GUILD_SALES_EXP_INVITE')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE OUT.GUILD_SALES_EXP_INVITE;

activities.name: Copy Sales Experience Invites to File

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cst.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cst.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cst.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,CONCAT(cst.Address1,' ',cst.Address2) as [ADDRESS]
,cst.City as [CITY]
,cst.[State] as [STATE]
,cst.Zip as ZIP
,lds.id as LEAD_ID
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,getdate() as DATE_TO_SURVEY
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,lds.cst_id as ACCOUNT_ID
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_1
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0')= '0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_1_NAME
--,CASE WHEN CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'') 
--ELSE CONCAT(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),';',CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR)) END as SALES_REP_ID
--,CASE WHEN CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,emp2.LastName) IS NULL THEN CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) 
--ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName),';',CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName)) END AS SALES_REP_NAME
,'FHI' as BRAND_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_2
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_2_NAME
,brn.LongName as SALES_BRANCH_NAME
,CONCAT('FHI-',brn.id) as BranchID
,COALESCE(org.Descr,'NONE') as SALES_ORGANIZATION
,app.Sold as SOLD
,app.[ApptDate] as APPOINTMENT_DATE
,srs.SourceCode as LEADSOURCE
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_FHI_app_Appointments] app
 inner join [ODS].[LP_FHI_Lds_Leads] lds
on app.id = lds.app_id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_FHI_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_FHI_prd_Products] prd
on lds.[productid] = prd.ProductID
 inner join [ODS].[LP_FHI_brn_Branches] brn
 on lds.brn_id = brn.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_ous_OrgUnits] ous
 on brn.id = ous.brn_id
 left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_org_Organization] org
 on ous.org_id = org.id 
 left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_emp_Employees] emp1 on lds.slr_id=emp1.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_emp_Employees] emp2 on lds.slr_id2=emp2.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_srs_SourceSubs] srs on srs.id=lds.srs_id
 WHERE
 app.Sat = 1 and app.Sold = 0
 and app.ApptDate is not null
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) = 1
and CAST(app.ApptDate as DATE)>='2024-08-30'

dependsOn.activity: Truncate Sales Exp Invite Staging table

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cst.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cst.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cst.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,lds.id as LEAD_ID
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,getdate() as DATE_TO_SURVEY
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,lds.cst_id as ACCOUNT_ID
,[slr_id] as SALES_REP_ID_1
-- ,'PHI' as BRAND_NAME
,case when lds.ProductId = 'Coat' then 'REN' else 'PHI' end as [BRAND_NAME]
,[slr_id2] as SALES_REP_ID_2
,brn.LongName as SALES_BRANCH_NAME
,org.Descr as SALES_ORGANIZATION
,app.Sold as SOLD
,app.[ApptDate] as APPOINTMENT_DATE
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_PHI_app_Appointments] app
 inner join [ODS].[LP_PHI_Lds_Leads] lds
on app.id = lds.app_id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_PHI_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_PHI_prd_Products] prd
on lds.[productid] = prd.ProductID
 inner join [ODS].[LP_PHI_brn_Branches] brn
 on lds.brn_id = brn.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_PHI_ous_OrgUnits] ous
 on brn.id = ous.brn_id
 left join [ODS].[LP_PHI_org_Organization] org
 on ous.org_id = org.id 
 WHERE
 app.Sat = 1 
 and app.ApptDate is not null
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate()))  between 0 and 1

SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cst.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cst.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cst.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,CONCAT(cst.Address1,' ',cst.Address2) as [ADDRESS]
,cst.City as [CITY]
,cst.[State] as [STATE]
,cst.Zip as ZIP
,lds.id as LEAD_ID
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,getdate() as DATE_TO_SURVEY
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,lds.cst_id as ACCOUNT_ID
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_1
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0')= '0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_1_NAME
--,CASE WHEN CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'') 
--ELSE CONCAT(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),';',CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR)) END as SALES_REP_ID
--,CASE WHEN CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,emp2.LastName) IS NULL THEN CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) 
--ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName),';',CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName)) END AS SALES_REP_NAME
--,[slr_id] as SALES_REP_ID_1
,'PBC' as BRAND_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_2
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_2_NAME
,brn.LongName as SALES_BRANCH_NAME
,CONCAT('PBC-',brn.id) as BranchID
,COALESCE(org.Descr,'NONE') as SALES_ORGANIZATION
,app.Sold as SOLD
,app.[ApptDate] as APPOINTMENT_DATE
,srs.SourceCode as LEADSOURCE
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_PBC_app_Appointments] app
 inner join [ODS].[LP_PBC_Lds_Leads] lds
on app.id = lds.app_id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_PBC_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_PBC_prd_Products] prd
on lds.[productid] = prd.ProductID
 inner join [ODS].[LP_PBC_brn_Branches] brn
 on lds.brn_id = brn.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_ous_OrgUnits] ous
 on brn.id = ous.brn_id
 left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_org_Organization] org
 on ous.org_id = org.id 
  left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_emp_Employees] emp1 on lds.slr_id=emp1.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_emp_Employees] emp2 on lds.slr_id2=emp2.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_srs_SourceSubs] srs on srs.id=lds.srs_id
 WHERE
 app.Sat = 1 and app.Sold = 0
 and app.ApptDate is not null
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) = 1
and CAST(app.ApptDate as DATE)>='2024-08-30'

SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cst.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cst.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cst.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,CONCAT(cst.Address1,' ',cst.Address2) as [ADDRESS]
,cst.City as [CITY]
,cst.[State] as [STATE]
,cst.Zip as ZIP
,lds.id as LEAD_ID
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,getdate() as DATE_TO_SURVEY
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,lds.cst_id as ACCOUNT_ID
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_1
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0')= '0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_1_NAME
--,CASE WHEN CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'') 
--ELSE CONCAT(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),';',CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR)) END as SALES_REP_ID
--,CASE WHEN CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,emp2.LastName) IS NULL THEN CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) 
--ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName),';',CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName)) END AS SALES_REP_NAME
--,[slr_id] as SALES_REP_ID_1
,'SWR' as BRAND_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_2
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_2_NAME
,brn.LongName as SALES_BRANCH_NAME
,CONCAT('SWR-',brn.id) as BranchID
,COALESCE(org.Descr,'NONE') as SALES_ORGANIZATION
,app.Sold as SOLD
,app.[ApptDate] as APPOINTMENT_DATE
,srs.SourceCode as LEADSOURCE
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_SWR_app_Appointments] app
 INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_SWR_Lds_Leads] lds on app.id = lds.app_id
 INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_SWR_cst_Customers] cst on lds.cst_id = cst.id
 INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_SWR_prd_Products] prd on lds.[productid] = prd.ProductID
 INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_SWR_brn_Branches] brn on lds.brn_id = brn.id
 LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_SWR_ous_OrgUnits] ous on brn.id = ous.brn_id
 LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_SWR_org_Organization] org on ous.org_id = org.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_emp_Employees] emp1 on lds.slr_id=emp1.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_emp_Employees] emp2 on lds.slr_id2=emp2.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_srs_SourceSubs] srs on srs.id=lds.srs_id
 WHERE
app.Sat = 1 and app.Sold = 0
and app.ApptDate is not null
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) = 1
--and org.Descr in ('GULF REGION', 'SOUTHWEST REGION')
and LEFT(lds.src_id, 2) <> 'HD'
and CAST(app.ApptDate as DATE)>='2024-08-30'

SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cst.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cst.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cst.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,CONCAT(cst.Address1,' ',cst.Address2) as [ADDRESS]
,cst.City as [CITY]
,cst.[State] as [STATE]
,cst.Zip as ZIP
,lds.id as LEAD_ID
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,getdate() as DATE_TO_SURVEY
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,lds.cst_id as ACCOUNT_ID
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_1
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0')= '0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_1_NAME
--,CASE WHEN CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'') 
--ELSE CONCAT(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),';',CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR)) END as SALES_REP_ID
--,CASE WHEN CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,emp2.LastName) IS NULL THEN CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) 
--ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName),';',CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName)) END AS SALES_REP_NAME
--,[slr_id] as SALES_REP_ID_1
,case when SR.emp_id is not null then 'HSI' else 'RTW' end as BRAND_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_2
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_2_NAME
,brn.LongName as SALES_BRANCH_NAME
,case when SR.emp_id is not null then CONCAT('HSI-',brn.id) else CONCAT('RTW-',brn.id) end as BranchID
,COALESCE(org.Descr,'NONE') as SALES_ORGANIZATION
,app.Sold as SOLD
,app.[ApptDate] as APPOINTMENT_DATE
,srs.SourceCode as LEADSOURCE
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_RTW_app_Appointments] app
 inner join [ODS].[LP_RTW_Lds_Leads] lds
on app.id = lds.app_id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_RTW_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_RTW_prd_Products] prd
on lds.[productid] = prd.ProductID
 inner join [ODS].[LP_RTW_brn_Branches] brn
 on lds.brn_id = brn.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_ous_OrgUnits] ous
 on brn.id = ous.brn_id
 left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_org_Organization] org
 on ous.org_id = org.id 
 left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_emp_Employees] emp1 on lds.slr_id=emp1.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_emp_Employees] emp2 on lds.slr_id2=emp2.id
 left join ODS.SALES_REP_LIST SR on SR.emp_id= lds.slr_id
 left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_srs_SourceSubs] srs on srs.id=lds.srs_id
 WHERE
 app.Sat = 1 and app.Sold = 0
 and app.ApptDate is not null
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) = 1
and CAST(app.ApptDate as DATE)>='2024-08-30'

SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cst.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cst.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cst.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,CONCAT(cst.Address1,' ',cst.Address2) as [ADDRESS]
,cst.City as [CITY]
,cst.[State] as [STATE]
,cst.Zip as ZIP
,lds.id as LEAD_ID
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,getdate() as DATE_TO_SURVEY
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,lds.cst_id as ACCOUNT_ID
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_1
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0')= '0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_1_NAME
--,CASE WHEN CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'') 
--ELSE CONCAT(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),';',CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR)) END as SALES_REP_ID
--,CASE WHEN CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,emp2.LastName) IS NULL THEN CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) 
--ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName),';',CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName)) END AS SALES_REP_NAME
--,[slr_id] as SALES_REP_ID_1
,case when lds.ProductId = 'Coat' then 'REN' else 'MAC' end as [BRAND_NAME]
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_2
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_2_NAME
,brn.LongName as SALES_BRANCH_NAME
,CONCAT(case when lds.ProductId = 'Coat' then 'REN-' else 'MAC-' end,brn.id) as BranchID
,COALESCE(org.Descr,'NONE') as SALES_ORGANIZATION
,app.Sold as SOLD
,app.[ApptDate] as APPOINTMENT_DATE
,srs.SourceCode as LEADSOURCE
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_MAC_app_Appointments] app
 inner join [ODS].[LP_MAC_Lds_Leads] lds
on app.id = lds.app_id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_MAC_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_MAC_prd_Products] prd
on lds.[productid] = prd.ProductID
 inner join [ODS].[LP_MAC_brn_Branches] brn
 on lds.brn_id = brn.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_MAC_ous_OrgUnits] ous
 on brn.id = ous.brn_id
 left join [ODS].[LP_MAC_org_Organization] org
 on ous.org_id = org.id 
 left join [ODS].[LP_MAC_emp_Employees] emp1 on lds.slr_id=emp1.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_MAC_emp_Employees] emp2 on lds.slr_id2=emp2.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_MAC_srs_SourceSubs] srs on srs.id=lds.srs_id
 WHERE
 app.Sat = 1 and app.Sold = 0
 and app.ApptDate is not null
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) = 1
and CAST(app.ApptDate as DATE)>='2024-08-30'

SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cst.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cst.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cst.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,CONCAT(cst.Address1,' ',cst.Address2) as [ADDRESS]
,cst.City as [CITY]
,cst.[State] as [STATE]
,cst.Zip as ZIP
,lds.id as LEAD_ID
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,getdate() as DATE_TO_SURVEY
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,lds.cst_id as ACCOUNT_ID
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_1
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0')= '0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_1_NAME
--,CASE WHEN CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'') 
--ELSE CONCAT(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),';',CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR)) END as SALES_REP_ID
--,CASE WHEN CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,emp2.LastName) IS NULL THEN CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) 
--ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName),';',CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName)) END AS SALES_REP_NAME
--,[slr_id] as SALES_REP_ID_1
,'HSI' as BRAND_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_2
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_2_NAME
,brn.LongName as SALES_BRANCH_NAME
,CONCAT('HSI-',brn.id) as BranchID
,COALESCE(org.Descr,'NONE') as SALES_ORGANIZATION
,app.Sold as SOLD
,app.[ApptDate] as APPOINTMENT_DATE
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_HSI_app_Appointments] app
 inner join [ODS].[LP_HSI_Lds_Leads] lds
on app.id = lds.app_id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_HSI_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_HSI_prd_Products] prd
on lds.[productid] = prd.ProductID
 inner join [ODS].[LP_HSI_brn_Branches] brn
 on lds.brn_id = brn.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_HSI_ous_OrgUnits] ous
 on brn.id = ous.brn_id
 left join [ODS].[LP_HSI_org_Organization] org
 on ous.org_id = org.id 
 left join [ODS].[LP_HSI_emp_Employees] emp1 on lds.slr_id=emp1.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_HSI_emp_Employees] emp2 on lds.slr_id2=emp2.id
 WHERE
 app.Sat = 1 and app.Sold = 0
 and app.ApptDate is not null
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) between 0 and 2
and CAST(app.ApptDate as DATE)>='2024-08-30'

SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cst.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cst.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cst.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,CONCAT(cst.Address1,' ',cst.Address2) as [ADDRESS]
,cst.City as [CITY]
,cst.[State] as [STATE]
,cst.Zip as ZIP
,lds.id as LEAD_ID
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,getdate() as DATE_TO_SURVEY
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,lds.cst_id as ACCOUNT_ID
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_1
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0')= '0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_1_NAME
--,CASE WHEN CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'') 
--ELSE CONCAT(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),';',CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR)) END as SALES_REP_ID
--,CASE WHEN CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,emp2.LastName) IS NULL THEN CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) 
--ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName),';',CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName)) END AS SALES_REP_NAME
--,[slr_id] as SALES_REP_ID_1
,'MXH' as BRAND_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_2
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_2_NAME
,brn.LongName as SALES_BRANCH_NAME
,CONCAT('MXH-',brn.id) as BranchID
,COALESCE(org.Descr,'NONE') as SALES_ORGANIZATION
,app.Sold as SOLD
,app.[ApptDate] as APPOINTMENT_DATE
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_MXH_app_Appointments] app
 inner join [ODS].[LP_MXH_Lds_Leads] lds
on app.id = lds.app_id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_MXH_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_MXH_prd_Products] prd
on lds.[productid] = prd.ProductID
 inner join [ODS].[LP_MXH_brn_Branches] brn
 on lds.brn_id = brn.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_MXH_ous_OrgUnits] ous
 on brn.id = ous.brn_id
 left join [ODS].[LP_MXH_org_Organization] org
 on ous.org_id = org.id 
 left join [ODS].[LP_MXH_emp_Employees] emp1 on lds.slr_id=emp1.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_MXH_emp_Employees] emp2 on lds.slr_id2=emp2.id
 WHERE
 app.Sat = 1 and app.Sold = 0
 and app.ApptDate is not null
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) = 1
and CAST(app.ApptDate as DATE)>='2024-08-30'

dependsOn.activity: Copy Sales Experience Invites to File

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cst.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cst.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cst.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,CONCAT(cst.Address1,' ',cst.Address2) as [ADDRESS]
,cst.City as [CITY]
,cst.[State] as [STATE]
,cst.Zip as ZIP
,lds.id as LEAD_ID
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,getdate() as DATE_TO_SURVEY
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,lds.cst_id as ACCOUNT_ID
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_1
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0')= '0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_1_NAME
--,CASE WHEN CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'') 
--ELSE CONCAT(CAST([slr_id] AS VARCHAR),';',CAST([slr_id2] AS VARCHAR)) END as SALES_REP_ID
--,CASE WHEN CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,emp2.LastName) IS NULL THEN CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName) 
--ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(emp1.FirstName,' ',emp1.LastName),';',CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName)) END AS SALES_REP_NAME
--,[slr_id] as SALES_REP_ID_1
,case when prd.productid in  ('Garg','Garage CV') then 'REN' else 'CTA' end as [BRAND_NAME]
,ISNULL(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_2
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(lds.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp2.FirstName,' ',emp2.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_2_NAME
,brn.LongName as SALES_BRANCH_NAME
,CONCAT(case when prd.productid in  ('Garg','Garage CV') then 'REN-' else 'CTA-' end,brn.id) as BranchID
,COALESCE(org.Descr,'NONE') as SALES_ORGANIZATION
,app.Sold as SOLD
,app.[ApptDate] as APPOINTMENT_DATE
,srs.SourceCode as LEADSOURCE
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_CTA_app_Appointments] app
 inner join [ODS].[LP_CTA_Lds_Leads] lds
on app.id = lds.app_id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_CTA_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
 inner join [ODS].[LP_CTA_prd_Products] prd
on lds.[productid] = prd.ProductID
 inner join [ODS].[LP_CTA_brn_Branches] brn
 on lds.brn_id = brn.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_ous_OrgUnits] ous
 on brn.id = ous.brn_id
 left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_org_Organization] org
 on ous.org_id = org.id 
 left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_emp_Employees] emp1 on lds.slr_id=emp1.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_emp_Employees] emp2 on lds.slr_id2=emp2.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_srs_SourceSubs] srs on srs.id=lds.srs_id
 WHERE
 app.Sat = 1 and app.Sold = 0
 and app.ApptDate is not null
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) = 1
and CAST(app.ApptDate as DATE)>='2024-08-30'
